name: cc-enslaver
description: A Claude Code plugin and LLM-agnostic rule pack that enforces systematic thinking, verified citations, and root-cause analysis — eliminating reactive, lazy AI behavior. v0.19 adds cwd-fallback for project edicts path resolution: when CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR fails to propagate (verified on Windows Bash subprocesses), the loader and manage_edicts CLI fall back to cwd if cwd has a .git or .claude/ marker, fixing silent project-edict invisibility. v0.18.1 hotfix: replaces catastrophic-backtracking regex in read_guard's bare try/except/pass detector with an O(N) linear scanner.
